settings.text: 20 ft of BlueTex™ 2mm Pro 50″ — the same product used on full-building cover and repair installs
4 aluminum TermBars and #10 hex screws to test the main attachment method
30 ft of 3″ white vapor barrier seam tape for sealing a test seam
EasyClip™ samples for testing roofline attachment on red iron buildings

settings.heading: Risk-Free Trial
settings.text: $100 credited back on any order of $500 or more.

settings.heading: Free Shipping
settings.text: Ships free in the contiguous USA.

settings.heading: Full-Size Materials
settings.text: Real product, not swatches. Test it on the building.

settings.heading: Real Person on the Phone
settings.text: 1-800-595-8772 — we help you size up the order.

settings.heading: BlueTex™ 2mm Pro 50″
settings.text: A 20-foot length of our 50-inch-wide 2mm Pro material used on full-building Cover & Repair installs.

settings.heading: Aluminum TermBars
settings.text: Four aluminum TermBars for fastening BlueTex tight to the purlins and girts.

settings.heading: 3″ White Vapor Barrier Seam Tape
settings.text: White seam tape for sealing the joint and maintaining the vapor barrier.

settings.heading: EasyClip™ Samples
settings.text: Samples for testing roofline attachment on red iron style buildings.

settings.heading: Pick a Section
settings.text: Choose one bay or one wall section to test the cover/repair system.

settings.heading: Install a TermBar Run
settings.text: Fasten the included 2mm Pro with the aluminum TermBars and screws.

settings.heading: Tape the Seam
settings.text: Use the white vapor barrier tape to test a clean finished seam.

settings.heading: Send Us Photos
settings.text: Send photos and dimensions for a full-building material list.

settings.heading: BlueTex™ Pro 2mm 50" Wide
settings.text: The main roll material included in the sample box.

settings.heading: 48" Wide Aluminum Term Bars
settings.text: The main mechanical attachment method used in the Cover/Repair System.

settings.heading: 3" White Vapor Barrier Seam Tape
settings.text: The seam tape included for testing the white finished side.

settings.heading: EasyClip™ Purlin Insulation Clip Hangers
settings.text: Included as samples for red iron roofline attachment.

settings.heading: What the Sample Box Points To
settings.text: The sample box is a test run for the larger BlueTex Cover/Repair System.

settings.heading: How the $100 credit works
settings.text: The $100 sample box credit applies toward a follow-up BlueTex order of $500 or more.

settings.heading: What to test
settings.text: Install the material on one representative section, tape a seam, and check the finished look before ordering for the building.

settings.heading: FAQ
settings.text: The sample box is made for metal building insulation cover and repair projects. Send photos after testing for quote help.
